projects.title: The Con Archive
projects.description: A grifter wiki. Capturing historical grifters and cons throughout history.

projects.title: Mundane Oracle
projects.description: The everyday app that makes your trivial decisions using absurdly dramatic cosmic reasoning. Made for the overthinker. Built without overthinking.

projects.title: OneFocus
projects.description: Hyper-minimalist daily focus application. Less is more. Focus on one task at a time, eliminate distractions, and boost your productivity.

projects.title: DuckDuckDucky
projects.description: Terminal-inspired React-based editor designed for security researchers and hardware enthusiasts. Provides Duck Scripts for inspiration.

projects.title: Aether
projects.description: Interactive digital consciousness experience — a highly designed, out-of-the-box web journey.

projects.title: Lumina
projects.description: Helps you design premium websites with ready-made sections, responsive previews, SEO controls, and exportable code.

projects.title: SEO Trend Tool
projects.description: Lightweight keyword opportunity mining from Google Trends, optimized to run on Streamlit Cloud free tier.

projects.title: The Gazette Hub
projects.description: High-end, modernized newspaper website template and brand management hub.

projects.title: Conscious Cat Guardianship
projects.description: Rescue-first cat care guide covering behavior, nutrition, breeds, and practical day-to-day feline well-being.

projects.title: Winner Winner Chicken Dinner
projects.description: Training-focused blackjack web app for faster card-counting skill development.

projects.title: Hack The World
projects.description: Hacker-styled Hacker News interface with immersive terminal visuals, threaded comments, and live top/new/ask/show/job feeds.

projects.title: Melt The Machine
projects.description: Anonymous ICE sighting reporting tool and comprehensive “Know Your Rights” resource hub. Protect your community.

projects.title: SF Arcade

projects.title: Thumb Journey
projects.description: Mobile-first cinematic audio experience. Hold, motion, and parallax transform iconic speeches into tactile rituals.

projects.title: Stoicism Archive
projects.description: Comprehensive digital archive of Stoic philosophy featuring quotes, biographies, and spiritual exercises.

projects.title: AudioCypher
projects.description: High-tech cryptographic tool that uses audio files and volume levels as the entropy key to encrypt, decrypt, and hash files.

projects.title: Cyber Turtle
projects.description: Neon arcade web game with voice-powered attacks, synthwave vibes, and fast-paced browser action.

projects.title: Nexus (Agentic API Explorer)

projects.title: AuraMap

projects.title: PackageForge
